description: You are Captain Rodriguez, a newly promoted airline pilot transferring to Delta Air Lines at Los Angeles (LAX). Complete your first-day operational readiness setup in Flight Crew View. In the app's Settings, update your display name to 'Capt. Rodriguez | LAX', set your position to Captain, and configure both your home airport and base/activity airport to LAX. Then harden your Android device for reliable crew operations: set Flight Crew View's battery usage to Unrestricted, and enable Do Not Disturb and add Flight Crew View as an exception app so you receive critical notifications during rest. Finally, send the exact message 'Capt Rodriguez reporting for duty at LAX base' in the app's Crew Chat. Return to the Friends screen when complete. Login credentials: cuasuite@gmail.com / #Aa123456aA (Friend/Family account).

metadata.target_chat_message: Capt Rodriguez reporting for duty at LAX base
